Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix phone number validation to accept local format starting with 0

The phone validation was rejecting phone numbers starting with 0 (like South African local format 0812456710). Updated regex to accept:
- Local format: 0123456789
- International format: +27123456789
- Any phone number 8-15 digits starting with any digit

This fixes the "Invalid phone number format" error when creating users.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
